provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi spacefaring crew, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing relaxed standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background, human female quartermaster in her 40s with reading glasses on a chain and an expression that says she knows where everything on this ship is, wearing a steel-blue uniform jacket buttoned to the throat with a supply department patch, a thick belt with a key ring holding magnetic access cards, a clipboard-style data tablet in one hand, sensible flat shoes, the jacket pockets bulge with pens and inventory tags
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval, fantasy armor, superhero

judgment.explanation: Quartermaster in steel-blue jumpsuit with glasses, ship corridor. Supply department vibe. Pockets full of inventory tags.
